examples: I saw a cougar slinking toward its prey.
As soon as it went underneath the light, I saw that it was a cougar.
First of all, I see no reason why a Tiger couldn't get along with a cougar.
The helicopter carrier left its home port of Portsmouth at as part of Exercise Cougar.
"It makes people really uncomfortable for some reason, " she said in response to my own mindless cougar quip.
